MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,944.00 FILED BY UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR AS TO DEFENDANT MONAHAN PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION MC2 CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONAHAN PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION $3,944.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,014.00, PLAINTIFFFS CLAIM AGAINST MC2 CAPITAL PARTNER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE NAME OF DEFENDANT "MONAHAN PACIFIC" IS AMENDED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO REFLECT THE DEFENDANT'S TRUE NAME, MONAHAN PACIFIC CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
